heading: Congressional procedures
label: 7206 Congressional procedures
notes: Change of NameCommittee on International Relations of House of Representatives changed to Committee on Foreign Affairs of House of Representatives by House Resolution No. 6, One Hundred Tenth Congress, .Jan. 5, 2007

children.heading: Referral of report
children.label: a Referral of report
children.text: A report described in section 7202(a)(1) or 7204(1) of this title shall be referred to the appropriate committee or committees of the House of Representatives and to the appropriate committee or committees of the Senate.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: A joint resolution introduced in the Senate shall be referred to the Committee on Foreign Relations, and a joint resolution introduced in the House of Representatives shall be referred to the Committee on International Relations.

children.heading: Reporting date
children.label: 2 Reporting date
children.text: A joint resolution referred to in paragraph (1) may not be reported before the eighth session day of Congress after the introduction of the joint resolution.
